read.dek: The episode starts with Iran and ends with Putin, but the real machinery is the formula between them: mass times energy times coordination. The winning group is not necessarily the richest or largest. It is the group whose story makes people move together without needing a meeting.
read.thesis: Power is not a conspiracy in a room. It is a road to a mountain, built by factions that want different gods, profits, budgets, and prophecies. The universal law of game theory names the force underneath: mass, energy, and coordination. Coordination matters most, and the highest coordination comes from story. A story makes people accept sacrifice, erase ego, dance without commands, and treat history as a script that must become real.

They do not merely hold an opinion. They try to bring a story into reality.

beats.summary: Mass, energy, and coordination become the lecture's engine for judging which groups win.

Energy is not physical bustle; it is motivation. Coordination is not just organization; it is the ability to work together toward an end. Coordination weighs most, energy next, mass last.

It is almost like a dance. That is why families, ethnicities, and religions can be so powerful: they coordinate before anyone writes an agenda.
